name: CCK-8 Cell Proliferation / Viability Assay
nameCn: CCK-8 细胞增殖/活力检测

components.name: 1. Seed cells in 96-well plate; allow overnight attachment

note.en: 100 µL complete medium/well. Seed density: 2,000–10,000 cells depending on doubling time (aim for ~60–70% confluency at endpoint). Fill outer-edge wells with PBS (not cells) to minimize edge effect evaporation.
note.zh: 每孔 100 µL 完全培养基。铺板密度：2,000–10,000 细胞（视倍增时间，终点时约 60–70% 汇合）。边缘孔加 PBS（不铺细胞）减少边缘效应蒸发。

components.name: 2. Add treatment/drug (Day 1); incubate 24/48/72 h at 37°C, 5% CO₂

note.en: Controls: (a) untreated cells, (b) blank (medium only, no cells), (c) solvent control. For long treatments (>48 h): refresh medium + drug at 48 h. Drug dilution: ≥8 concentrations, 0.5-log steps, to generate IC₅₀ curve.
note.zh: 对照：(a) 未处理细胞；(b) 空白孔（仅培养基）；(c) 溶剂对照。长时间处理（>48 h）：48 h 换液并重新给药。IC₅₀ 曲线：≥8 个浓度梯度，0.5 对数间隔。

components.name: 3. Add 10 µL CCK-8 reagent directly to medium; mix by pipetting once

note.en: Do NOT remove medium. Use multichannel pipette. Protect reagent from light. Avoid bubbles (interfere with reading). CCK-8 contains WST-8 tetrazolium salt.
note.zh: 不去除培养基直接加入。用多道移液器。试剂避光。避免产生气泡（影响读数）。CCK-8 含 WST-8 四唑盐。

components.name: 4. Incubate 1–4 h at 37°C, 5% CO₂; check color every 30 min after 1 h

note.en: Optimal: orange-yellow color; OD 0.6–1.5. Too dark (OD >2.0): dilute cells or reduce incubation. Incubation time should be consistent across all plates.
note.zh: 最佳：橙黄色；OD 0.6–1.5。过深（OD >2.0）：减少细胞数或缩短孵育时间。各板孵育时间必须一致。

note.en: No need to remove medium or add DMSO — non-destructive. Can re-incubate and re-read same plate at later timepoints.
note.zh: 无需去除培养基或加 DMSO——非破坏性。可继续孵育后重复读取同一培养板。

note.en: % Viability = (OD_treated − OD_blank) / (OD_control − OD_blank) × 100. IC₅₀: nonlinear regression (4-parameter logistic, GraphPad Prism log(inhibitor) vs normalized response).
note.zh: % 活力 = (OD处理 − OD空白) / (OD对照 − OD空白) × 100。IC₅₀：非线性回归（4 参数逻辑斯谛，GraphPad Prism log[inhibitor] vs 归一化响应）。

notes.en: CCK-8 advantages over MTT: (1) non-destructive (can re-read), (2) no DMSO solubilization step, (3) higher sensitivity, (4) no interference from culture medium. Interference: phenol-red (small, use reference wavelength), serum >15%, strong reducers. For suspension cells: centrifuge plate before reading (300×g 5 min).
notes.zh: CCK-8 优于 MTT：(1) 非破坏性（可重复读）；(2) 无需 DMSO 溶解；(3) 灵敏度更高；(4) 培养基干扰小。干扰因素：酚红（小，用参考波长校正）、血清 >15%、强还原剂。悬浮细胞：读板前离心（300×g 5 min）。

ref: Ishiyama et al. (1997) Talanta 44:1299–1305; Dojindo CCK-8 Technical Manual; Kurokawa et al. (1999) Anal Biochem 268:375–380

briefSteps.en: Seed cells in 96-well plate → overnight attachment → add treatment → incubate 24–72 h → add 10 µL CCK-8 → incubate 1–4 h at 37°C → read A₄₅₀ nm → calculate % viability / IC₅₀
briefSteps.zh: 铺细胞至 96 孔板 → 过夜贴壁 → 加药处理 → 孵育 24–72 h → 加 10 µL CCK-8 → 37°C 孵育 1–4 h → 读 A₄₅₀ nm → 计算活力百分比 / IC₅₀

detailedSteps.en: Prepare a single-cell suspension and seed 2,000–10,000 cells per well in 100 µL complete medium in a 96-well plate; fill all outer-edge wells with PBS (no cells) to prevent evaporation-driven edge effects.
detailedSteps.zh: 制备单细胞悬液，每孔铺 2,000–10,000 个细胞（100 µL 完全培养基）；边缘孔加 PBS（不铺细胞），防止蒸发产生边缘效应。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate overnight at 37°C, 5% CO₂ to allow cells to attach and equilibrate (12–18 h).
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C、5% CO₂ 过夜培养（12–18 h），使细胞贴壁平衡。

detailedSteps.en: Replace medium with 100 µL complete medium containing test compound at desired concentrations (≥8 concentrations in 0.5-log steps for IC₅₀); include untreated control, blank (medium only, no cells), and solvent control (DMSO ≤0.1%).
detailedSteps.zh: 换液至含受试化合物的完全培养基（每孔 100 µL；IC₅₀ 曲线设 ≥8 个浓度，0.5 对数间隔）；同时设未处理对照、空白孔（仅培养基）及溶剂对照（DMSO ≤0.1%）。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at 37°C, 5% CO₂ for 24, 48, or 72 h as required; for treatments >48 h, refresh medium and re-add drug at the 48 h mark.
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C、5% CO₂ 孵育 24、48 或 72 h；处理时间 >48 h 时，在 48 h 时换液并重新加药。

detailedSteps.en: Add 10 µL CCK-8 reagent directly to each well (do NOT remove medium); use a multichannel pipette, pipette once to mix, and protect the plate from light.
detailedSteps.zh: 直接向每孔加入 10 µL CCK-8 试剂（不去除培养基）；用多道移液器加液后轻吹混匀，培养板避光。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate at 37°C, 5% CO₂ for 1–4 h; check color development every 30 min after the first hour — optimal OD450 is 0.6–1.5 (orange-yellow color).
detailedSteps.zh: 37°C、5% CO₂ 孵育 1–4 h；从第 1 h 起每 30 min 检查显色情况，最佳 OD450 为 0.6–1.5（橙黄色）。

detailedSteps.en: Read absorbance at 450 nm (reference wavelength 630–650 nm) immediately on a microplate reader; do not remove medium and do not add DMSO — this assay is non-destructive.
detailedSteps.zh: 立即用酶标仪读取 450 nm 吸光度（参考波长 630–650 nm）；无需去除培养基或加 DMSO——本实验为非破坏性检测。

detailedSteps.en: Calculate % viability using: % Viability = (OD_treated − OD_blank) / (OD_control − OD_blank) × 100; fit IC₅₀ by nonlinear regression (4-parameter logistic model) in GraphPad Prism.
detailedSteps.zh: 计算活力百分比：% 活力 = (OD处理 − OD空白) / (OD对照 − OD空白) × 100；用 GraphPad Prism 4 参数逻辑斯谛模型拟合 IC₅₀。

note.en: Cells attached in 96-well plate; can be left overnight at 37°C before adding treatment
note.zh: 细胞已贴壁于 96 孔板，可在 37°C 过夜后再加药处理

note.en: Drug treatment incubation (24–72 h) is a natural stopping point; proceed to CCK-8 addition at the desired endpoint
note.zh: 药物处理孵育（24–72 h）为自然停顿点；在预设终点时加入 CCK-8

usage.en: Measure cell proliferation and viability using CCK-8 (WST-8) colorimetric assay.
usage.zh: CCK-8（WST-8）比色法检测细胞增殖和活力。
